field_glossary.dataset_sha256: top-level validation dataset hash applied to all transfer output rows
field_glossary.expected_owner_id: run-level active owner expected by the clean-holdout transfer split
field_glossary.owner_id_hat: predicted active owner id in APIS-300 rows; this is not a multi-owner claim
field_glossary.source_record_hash: row-level source provenance binding in every transfer output row
field_glossary.tokenizer_source: runtime-local path in internal artifact; redacted from anonymous release copies

overfit_guard: Perfect TPR/FPR must be interpreted with source hashes, wrong/null/random owner controls, single-owner scope, and latency/query frontier.
